user.description:
Enter your 6-digit Durin code to connect your Home Assistant to the Durin ecosystem.
**Get your code from the Durin Mobile App.**

data_description.name: A friendly name for this integration instance.
data_description.durin_code: Obtain this 6-digit code from the Durin Mobile App in the Residence you want to link with this Home Assistant instance.

reauth_confirm.description: Your connection needs to be reauthorized. Please enter a new 6-digit Durin code.

data_description.durin_code: Get a new 6-digit code from the Durin Mobile App.

error.invalid_code: Invalid Durin code. The code must be exactly 6 digits.
error.code_expired: This Durin code has expired. Please generate a new code in the Durin app.
error.connection_failed: Unable to connect to the Durin backend. Please check your internet connection.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

abort.already_configured: This Durin installation is already configured.

init.title: Durin Options
init.description: Configuration is managed through the Durin platform. Use a new code to reconfigure.

sync_devices.name: Sync Devices
sync_devices.description: Manually sync all devices and entities with the Durin cloud.

send_command.name: Send Command
send_command.description: Send a command to a specific entity through Durin.

entity_id.name: Entity ID
entity_id.description: The entity to send the command to.

action.name: Action
action.description: The action to perform (e.g., turn_on, turn_off).

params.name: Parameters
params.description: Additional parameters for the command as a JSON object.

cloud_connection_failed.title: Cloud Connection Failed
cloud_connection_failed.description: The connection to the Durin cloud has failed. Please check your network connection.

sync_failed.title: Device Sync Failed
sync_failed.description: Unable to sync devices with the Durin cloud. The integration will retry automatically.

mqtt_auth_failed.title: Authentication Failed
mqtt_auth_failed.description: Your credentials are invalid or have been revoked. Please reconfigure the integration.
